steps.title: Substitute x = 56 into the function
steps.content: We're given $m(x) = \frac{x}{7}$ and need to find $m(56)$. To evaluate the function at $x = 56$, we substitute this value into the definition.

steps.title: Simplify to find the answer
steps.content: $$m(56) = \frac{56}{7} = 8$$ That matches the correct answer - D is correct.
